{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Bounding Gazelle
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Bounding Gazelle]] is a model of a full-sized cloudship produced by [[Reigan Shen]]'s [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Bounding Gazelle]] is [[Eithan's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Bounding Gazelle]] is a high performance cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"This is a model of a full-sized cloudship, The Bounding Gazelle, among the fastest my Soulsmiths have ever produced."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“It’s made for high performance,” he’d said, “so it needs either richer aura or more madra.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
